Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.vintage" AS vintage, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' AND bs."in.vintage" = '1980 to 1989' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/663f414c44fe5ff8a0d756edff5c12225bf216e7b58e690825fb8895d74149f2/3c7749ad-169e-40fc-8c9f-603f058ec1ab/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
